text: disabled tracking pixels in cold email. gmail now warns recipients about them. reply rate went up. counterintuitive but the data is clear.
58% of all cold email replies come from the first email. not the follow-ups. stop writing 7-step sequences and make email 1 perfect.
first name tokens in cold emails now trigger spam filters. the exact thing everyone does to personalize is what gets you flagged. use business context instead.
polished emails get flagged as AI-generated. casual tone wins. the worse your grammar the better your deliverability. wild times.
cold email sweet spot: 4-6 lines. that is it. every line over 6 drops reply rate. brevity is not laziness. brevity is respect.
visualping.io monitors 200+ competitor pages for me. they change a price or update a landing page and i know in 30 seconds. $5/mo.
self-reply on your own tweets gets 3-5x more clicks than a bio link. algorithm shows your reply first. free distribution hack.
tiktok changed the algo again. completion rate threshold increased. your 15-second videos need to loop or they are dead on arrival.
first hour after posting on tiktok determines everything. the algorithm tests your video with followers first now. build a base or die.
youtube shorts sweet spot is 50-60 seconds. not 15. not 90. and trending audio in the first 5 seconds matters more than the title.
18-22 shorts per month is the optimal posting frequency. not daily. not weekly. that specific range outperforms everything else.
instagram now tracks DM shares as a priority metric. content people share privately ranks higher than content they just like.
instagram has an originality score now. cross-post from tiktok with a watermark and your reach gets crushed. post native or die.
one piece of content becomes 20 outputs. blog post to tweet thread to short to reel to newsletter section to gumroad product. zero waste.
tiktok is becoming a search engine. text overlays with keywords boost discoverability. tutorials outperform entertainment. adapt or get buried.
nano banana reduces UGC video production cost from $500+ to $0.10 per video. 38% conversion boost. i am listing this as a fiverr service.
micro-influencers get 3-5x the engagement of mega-influencers. $100-500 per post vs $10K+. findmecreators.com for discovery.
pricing optimization is 2-4x more impactful than customer acquisition. most people obsess over traffic when they should obsess over pricing.
animated paywalls convert 2.9x better than static ones. added animation to the upgrade screen and trial conversion jumped to 22%.
contextual upgrade prompts at friction points beat random popups every time. show the paywall when they hit the limit not when they open the app.
96% of users watch explainer videos during onboarding. if you do not have one you are leaving retention on the table.
usage-based pricing grew 126% year over year. per-seat pricing is dying. credits and consumption models win in 2026.
$29-39 is the impulse buy zone for digital products. not $9 not $99. pack 60-80 proven examples into a notion doc. 1-2 hours to build.
revenue-based financing unlocks at $15K MRR. non-dilutive. 7 providers competing for your business. no equity given up.
GEO is the new SEO. content with tables citations and specific statistics gets 30-40% more visibility in AI search results. princeton confirmed.
680 million citation analysis: reddit content is gold for perplexity rankings. chatgpt prefers structured data. google AI likes authority.
50% of consumers now use AI for product discovery. if your content is not optimized for AI citation you are invisible to half your audience.
70 custom app store product pages gives you 2x keyword targeting. most devs have 1. apple literally gives you 70 slots. use them.
creative testing beats keyword optimization for app store conversion. screenshots matter more than metadata. test 5 variants minimum.
MCP servers cut my agent context usage by 46.9%. one config change. if you run AI agents and are not using MCP you are burning tokens.
n8n has 160K github stars and is self-hostable. AI-native workflow automation. replaced 4 paid tools for me. $0/month.
vercel labs released agent-browser. authenticated scraping with your actual browser profile. no more re-login headaches. game over for puppeteer.
karpathy coined vibe coding. 31K likes 5.3M views. build apps by describing what you want. the risk is code quality. mitigation: tests.
built a SaaS MVP in 4 days with vibe coding. gemini flash stack. stripe integration on day 1. first paying user on day 4.
15-30 second app promo formula: problem statement then solution then screen recording then CTA. screen recordings beat talking heads every time.
spent 3 hours building an email warmup system. turns out warmup now takes 14-21 days in 2026 not 7-14. the providers changed the rules.
bought pre-warmed inboxes for $49 each. skipped the 21-day warmup period entirely. traded money for time. worth it at this stage.
cold email volume consistency matters more than volume size. sending 50/day every day beats 500 on monday and nothing until friday.
subdomains for cold email are non-negotiable. protect your main domain reputation. learned this the hard way. $10/year insurance.
AI for research. human for strategy. that is the 80/20 split for cold outbound in 2026. the human writes the angle. AI finds the prospects.
intent-based timing on cold emails gets 2-4x reply rates. send when they are actively researching not when your sequence says to.
clay.com for intent data enrichment. target prospects actively researching your category. reply rates are night and day vs cold lists.
on-chain whale tracking: when exchanges see large inflows it means sell pressure. when VCs have token unlocks scheduled you already know the direction.
89 approved alpha entries sitting in a CSV. near zero converted to actual revenue. built a daily churn process: 3 entries per day into execution.
169 engagement bait entries producing zero content. each one can generate 3+ social posts. that is 507 ready posts from data we already have.
AI influencer stack costs $40/month to start. heygen for video. elevenlabs for voice. leonardo for visual consistency. that is the whole stack.
transparency about being AI-generated builds trust faster than hiding it. counterintuitive. the audience already knows. just own it.
fanvue allows AI creators explicitly. onlyfans does not. platform selection is the difference between building a business and getting banned.
faceless youtube channels: stack ads plus sponsors plus affiliates on every video. CPM varies from $1 to $9 by niche. finance and tech pay most.
tiktok creator rewards pays 10x the old creator fund. sponsorships still pay more than any platform fund. stack both.
